instagram.header: Deck the Abyss. 🔗 Link in bio → play free
instagram.caption: The tide is rising, and it brings more than just salt and bone. Welcome to Thalassa, the realm of drowned kings and abyssal predators. 🌊 Will you master the freeze magic of the deep, or will you be pulled under by the cosmic corruption of the Void? Build your deck and prepare for tactical warfare across the four elemental realms. The Void waits for no one. 💀⚔️
instagram.alt_text: A dark, cinematic view of underwater coral ruins with bioluminescent ghostly figures rising from the abyss.

facebook.body:
The Elemental Quadrant hangs by a thread. As the Aether Bleed tears through reality, four realms remain as our only bulwark against total oblivion: the searing peaks of Cinderfall, the shifting sands, the howling gale, and the crushing depths of Thalassa. In the dark, silent waters of Thalassa, the drowned undead and siren queens weave forbidden magic to repel the corruption of the Void. 

VOIDBORN is a tactical TCG where your mastery of the elements determines the fate of civilization. Whether you prefer to command the infernal flames of Cinderfall or the freezing, rhythmic tides of the abyssal ruins, every card you play influences the survival of your realm. 

We invite you to join the fray, climb the ranked ladders, and forge a deck worthy of legend. What is your preferred elemental affinity? Tell us in the comments.
facebook.link_cta: Begin your journey and play for free at

discord.content:
**Welcome to the VOIDBORN Community**

The Elemental Quadrant is under siege by the Void. It is time to choose your path and defend what remains of our shattered reality.

**What awaits you in VOIDBORN:**
- **Deep Tactical Gameplay:** Master the elements of Fire, Water, Wind, and Earth.
- **Four Elemental Realms:** Explore the lore and cards of Cinderfall, Thalassa, and beyond.
- **Ranked Competition:** Test your deck-building skills against players worldwide.
- **Cosmic Corruption:** Face the Aether Bleed and turn your enemies' power against them.

[Start your adventure here](https://voidborn.fun)
